description: baseline: faithful Python port of model-catalog.js from A1-AI-Core. Live OpenRouter catalog with injected safeFetch + isEgressAllowed. 10 cases cover egress-blocked, HTTP 200 live, HTTP 500, empty list, fetch-error, with/without apiKey, custom referer/title, invalid payload, missing-id model filter. Per-case field set with 7 fields (online, source, reason, modelsCount, lastRequestUrl, lastRequestMethod, lastRequestHeaders). Inlined FALLBACK_MODELS (5 models) + normalizeModels from model-policy.js. Also fixed per_field_pct bug: previously divided by total n instead of count of cases with that field, making heterogeneous-field-set diagnostics misleading (score was always correct).
